notes: I've created a cinematic landing page for your AI Design Guide. The design centers on a luminous, core-like object set against a dark, research-observatory atmosphere. I've used translucent panels, a subtle grid overlay, and minimalist typography to give it an immersive, science-exhibit feel, moving away from a standard SaaS layout toward a more editorial, interface-like experience.
prompt: Design a cinematic landing page for a prompt guide website with the single hero title 'AI Design Guide'. Use a dark research-observatory atmosphere, one large luminous core object, layered translucent panels, quiet grid overlays, and a science-exhibit sense of depth inspired by immersive interactive microsites. The result should feel like a prompt analysis interface rather than a generic SaaS homepage, with minimal text beyond the hero title and a strong editorial composition.
suggestions: Explore a more golden or amber core color
Add interactive 'data-points' that appear on hover
title: AI Design Guide Landing Page
